errors.page_404_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

saved.empty_body: Tap the heart on a car to find it here — synced across all your devices when you're signed in.

bookings.signed_out_title: Sign in to see your bookings

bookings.empty_body: You don't have any requests yet. Explore cars and make your first one!

home.meta_description: Find independent car rental companies across Italy. City cars, SUVs, electric, convertibles and vans. Pay the rental company directly, no hidden fees.
home.hero_subtitle: Aggregator of independent car rental companies across Italy. Find the car, choose the rental company, pay them directly.
home.where_ph_mobile: Where do you want to go?

listing.no_cars_for: No cars found for {{location}}. Try another city or widen the filters.

listing.set_dates_hint: Set dates and city to search. In the meantime, here's who's nearby.
listing.seo_desc_location: Find cars to rent in {{location}} from independent rental companies. Transparent prices, pay the rental company directly.
listing.seo_desc_default: Search cars to rent across Italy. City cars, SUVs, electric, convertibles and vans from independent rental companies.

blog.meta_description: Guides, tips and stories from the world of car rental in Italy: how to save, where to go, what to know before you rent.

blog.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to rent better: how to choose the right car, save money and travel with peace of mind across Italy.
blog.empty: No articles published yet. Check back soon!
blog.cta_title: Find the right car near you
blog.cta_body: Independent car rental companies across Italy, no hidden fees.

confirmation.push_title: We'll keep you posted via push

confirmation.sync_error: We couldn't save the request on the server. Try again later from the Bookings page.
confirmation.sign_in_to_save: Sign in to save this request to your account.

booking_detail.hint_declined: The rental company couldn't accept. Try another car.
booking_detail.hint_completed: We hope it all went well!
booking_detail.cancel_confirm_body_confirmed: You're about to cancel a booking already confirmed by {{host}}. They'll be notified. This action is irreversible.
booking_detail.cancel_confirm_body_requested: You're about to withdraw your request. The rental company won't be able to accept it anymore.

booking_form.title: Confirm booking

booking_form.set_dates_for_total: Set the dates to see the total.
booking_form.no_charge_body_mobile: {{host}} confirms the request within 24h. Payment happens at pickup.

profile.signed_out_body: Your bookings, saved cars and documents stay with you, always.

profile.no_upcoming_body: When you have an active request, it shows up here front and center.
profile.host_have_title: You have a rental company account
profile.host_promo_title: Want to earn with your cars?
profile.host_promo_body: Set terms, payments and list your car for rent.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Chat with the rental companies of your bookings.
messages.empty: No messages. When you contact a rental company or get a reply, the conversation shows up here.
messages.select_hint: Select a conversation to read its messages.
messages.thread_empty: Write a message to start the chat.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Updates on bookings, messages and platform news.
notifications.empty_body: You have no notifications. When updates arrive, you'll find them here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Notification, language and privacy preferences.
settings.email_hint: When to receive emails from the platform.
settings.toggle_messages_hint: When a rental company writes to you.
settings.toggle_marketing_hint: Promotions, platform news. You can turn them off anytime.
settings.toggle_push_hint: Coming in the next release — the service worker isn't active yet.
settings.privacy_hint: GDPR / download your data / account deletion.
settings.cookie_body: Update your consent to error diagnostics, analytics and session replay anytime.
settings.download_body: Profile, bookings, saved. Request by email to hello@moviq.it.
settings.signout_body: To get back in you'll receive a new magic link via email.
settings.delete_body: Deletes profile, bookings and saved. Irreversible action.
settings.delete_confirm: Delete your account? This action deletes your profile, associated bookings and saved cars. It's irreversible.

vehicle.chat_after_request: Chat opens after you request the booking
vehicle.no_charge_note: You're not charged anything. The rental company confirms within 24h.
vehicle.seo_desc: Rent {{name}} at {{price}}€/day{{city}}. From independent rental companies, no surcharges.

help.page_subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions or write to us at hello@moviq.it.
help.not_found_title: Can't find what you're looking for?
help.not_found_body: Write to us at hello@moviq.it. We reply within 24h.
help.q_book: How do I book a car?
help.a_book: Search by city and dates, pick a car and tap "Request booking". The rental company confirms within 24h. You don't pay anything before pickup.
help.a_payment: Payment and the deposit are collected at car pickup by the rental company. The deposit amount is shown on each vehicle page and is returned on drop-off.
help.a_cancel: Yes. You can cancel for free up to 24h before pickup from the "Bookings" page.
help.a_verified: All rental companies are verified with ID and VAT number. You'll find the "Verified" badge on profiles.
help.a_insurance: Every vehicle includes mandatory third-party liability insurance. Rental companies may offer optional coverage (collision, theft) — check the terms on the car listing.
help.q_list_car: How do I list my car for rent?
help.a_list_car: We're opening sign-up progressively. Write to hello@moviq.it to request access.
help.a_email: Write to us at hello@moviq.it — we reply within 24h on weekdays.
help.a_phone: For issues during an active rental: +39 02 0000 0000 (Mon–Sat 9-19).
help.a_data: Email for the account, name/phone if you complete your profile, and your booking data. No advertising tracking.
help.a_current_version: Pre-launch draft version. The final terms will be published before the public launch.
help.a_cookies: Only technical cookies to keep the session. No profiling or third-party cookies.

seolanding.meta_desc: Find cars to rent in {{city}} from independent rental companies. City cars, SUVs, electric, convertibles and vans. Pay the rental company directly.
seolanding.body: Aggregator of car rental companies in {{city}}. Browse city cars, SUVs, electric, convertibles and vans. Request directly from the rental company, no fees.

cookie.pref_intro: Choose which tools you let us use to improve the product. No advertising, no sharing data with third parties.
cookie.cat_necessary_desc: Cookies/localStorage for the login session, current search, language preferences. Without these the app doesn't work.
cookie.cat_errors_desc: Detects crashes and bugs. We only transmit the error stack trace — no email, no IP, no form content.
cookie.cat_analytics_desc: Posthog (anonymized events) and Plausible (cookieless): aggregate pageviews and actions to understand what works. No personal data.
cookie.cat_replay_desc: Anonymous mouse/scroll/click replay to identify UX friction. Off by default. Inputs masked.
cookie.change_mind_pre: You can change your mind anytime from
cookie.banner_body: We use technical cookies for the login session. To improve the product we collect anonymous crash and aggregate usage data — you can choose what to enable.

policies.no_terms: The rental company hasn't specified particular terms.

report.title: Report
report.details_ph: Explain what happened. More details help us resolve it faster.
report.confidential: Reports are confidential. We review every report within 24 hours.
report.sent: Report sent. We'll review it within 24h.
